type: strategy
name: "Job Search Strategy"
---

# Job Search Strategy

## Target Roles
List the exact job titles you're targeting. Be specific — this feeds into radar search queries.
- Primary title 1 (e.g. Product Owner)
- Primary title 2 (e.g. Platform Product Manager)
- Acceptable variant (e.g. Technical Product Manager)

## Target Industries
Industries you're actively pursuing vs. open to:
- **Actively targeting:** Industry 1, Industry 2
- **Open to:** Industry 3, Industry 4
- **Avoid:** Industry you don't want

## Location & Remote Preferences
- **Location:** Your city/region
- **Remote:** Fully remote preferred / open to hybrid / open to onsite
- **Relocation:** Yes / No / Open to certain cities

## Salary Floor
- **Minimum base:** $XXX,000
- **Total comp target:** $XXX,000+

## Company Size Preference
- Startup / Series B+ / Mid-size / Enterprise / Any

## What You're NOT Looking For
Be specific — this helps filter radar results:
- No staffing/contracting roles
- No roles requiring [specific tech/domain you don't want]
- No [specific company type]

## Search Keywords
Additional keywords to include in job radar queries beyond the defaults:
- Keyword 1
- Keyword 2

## Notes
Any other context about your search that should inform Claude's recommendations.
